secrets.description: Anthropic API key — powers Claude models for brain and worker
secrets.prompt: Let's get your AI connected! Paste your Anthropic API key

secrets.description: Default Claude model used by the agent
secrets.prompt: Which model should your agent think with?

secrets.description: OpenAI API key — enables GPT models as an alternative provider
secrets.prompt: If you'd also like GPT models available, paste your OpenAI key (or skip)

secrets.description: Ollama endpoint URLs — enables local/self-hosted models
secrets.prompt: Got Ollama running locally? Drop the endpoint URL here (or skip)

secrets.description: Bearer token protecting the Brain API — auto-generated if not provided
secrets.prompt: Got a specific auth token you'd like to use? (leave blank and I'll generate a secure one for you)

secrets.description: The persona name your AI agent responds to
secrets.prompt: What would you like to call your agent?

secrets.description: Host path for nightly backups (e.g. /backups/bakerst)
secrets.prompt: Where should nightly backups be stored? (or skip to disable)

features.name: Telegram
features.description: Chat with your agent through Telegram

secrets.description: Telegram Bot API token from @BotFather
secrets.prompt: Paste your Telegram bot token (from @BotFather)

secrets.description: Restrict bot to specific chat IDs
secrets.prompt: Which chat IDs should the bot respond to? (comma-separated, or leave blank for all)

features.name: Discord
features.description: Chat with your agent on Discord

secrets.description: Discord bot token from the Developer Portal
secrets.prompt: Paste your Discord bot token

features.name: Long-Term Memory
features.description: Give your agent better recall with Voyage AI embeddings

secrets.description: Voyage AI API key for semantic embeddings
secrets.prompt: Paste your Voyage AI key (or skip — memory still works, just less precise)

features.name: GitHub
features.description: Let your agent browse repos, issues, and PRs

secrets.description: GitHub personal access token (classic or fine-grained)
secrets.prompt: Paste your GitHub personal access token

features.name: Web Search
features.description: Give your agent the ability to search the web via Perplexity

secrets.description: Perplexity AI API key for web search
secrets.prompt: Paste your Perplexity API key

features.name: Obsidian
features.description: Connect your agent to your Obsidian knowledge vault

secrets.description: Host filesystem path to the Obsidian vault directory
secrets.prompt: Where's your Obsidian vault? (full path to the folder)

features.name: Voice Mode
features.description: Talk to your agent out loud — with wake word detection

secrets.description: Speech-to-text provider API key
secrets.prompt: Paste your Speech-to-Text API key (for understanding you)

secrets.description: Text-to-speech provider API key
secrets.prompt: Paste your Text-to-Speech API key (for speaking back)

secrets.description: Picovoice access key for wake word detection
secrets.prompt: Paste your Picovoice key (this powers the wake word — like saying 'Hey Baker')

features.name: Google Workspace
features.description: Let your agent read your Gmail, check your Calendar, and browse Google Drive

secrets.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client ID (Desktop type)
secrets.prompt: Paste your Google OAuth Client ID
secrets.instructions:
You'll need OAuth credentials from Google Cloud Console:
1. Go to https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
2. Create an OAuth 2.0 Client ID (choose 'Desktop app')
3. Copy the Client ID and Secret from the confirmation screen

secrets.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client secret
secrets.prompt: And the Client Secret that came with it

secrets.description: Pre-authorized OAuth token JSON (contains refresh token)
secrets.prompt: If you already have an authorized token file, drop the path here or paste the JSON

providerValidation.message: At least one AI provider must be configured
